action_items.context: Client missed the previously scheduled drop last Thursday due to transportation issues.

action_items.task: Call the PO immediately if running late or if transportation issues occur
action_items.context: Contingency plan to avoid future missed appointments and violations.

critical_updates.details: Client missed his scheduled UA last Thursday, citing a broken-down bus on Route 12. Denies any current substance use. PO did not issue a formal violation due to the client having two clean UAs in the past 45 days.
Continues to live with his aunt. Arrangement is stable with no tension. He does not pay formal rent but helps with the light bill and groceries.
Employed part-time at Walmart in the stocking department, working 20-30 hours a week. Manager stated he needs to reach 6 months of tenure before moving to full-time.
Reports no contact with law enforcement. Changed his phone number to distance himself from old neighborhood associates.
Living with his aunt, who works first shift while he works second. Relationship remains positive and supportive.

next_episode_context: Tyrell is maintaining stable housing with his aunt and working part-time at Walmart, though he is waiting to hit the 6-month mark for full-time hours. He missed a UA last week due to a broken-down bus but avoided a formal violation because he had two recent clean drops. A makeup UA is scheduled for this Friday at 2:00 PM. He reports no new law enforcement contact and has successfully distanced himself from negative peers by changing his phone number.
